name: USS Penguin (ASR 12)
events: 23 Dec 1944 HrMs O 21 (Lt. F.J. Kroesen, RNN) conducted exercises off New London, Connecticut, U.S.A. Several practice torpedo shots were made during which USS Penguin (Lt.Cdr. G.W. Albin, USNR) acted as target. (1)
2 Jan 1945 HrMs O 21 (Lt. F.J. Kroessen, RNN) conducted attack exercises off New London, Connecticut, U.S.A. during which USS Penguin (Lt.Cdr. G.W. Albin, USNR) acted as target. (1)
